author: Honkai: Star Rail
text:
Honkai: Star Rail X Kura Sushi Collaboration PV: "Lucky Rolls, Crazy Bites!" | Honkai: Star Rail
Trailblazers, the Honkai: Star Rail x Kura Sushi Collab is just 1 week away!
Don't miss out on the delicious Honkai: Star Rail-inspired menu items, and be sure to grab the exclusive 3-piece Lunch Box Set, along with special capsule prizes, and redemption tickets. 

▼Visit Kura Sushi's official website for more details
https://kurasushi.com/honkaistarrail-bikkura-pon-collaboration

#HSRXKuraSushi #starrail 
#HonkaiStarRail #Aventurine #Sparkle
